market_pulse: Strong weekend activity across premium venues; LIV leading social engagement with metro-booth talent (Matroda 5/31); Encore & OMNIA featuring major headliners (Marshmello, Steve Aoki); Zouk building momentum with Meduza; notable gap in story-based countdown content.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Major talent across top venues (Metro Boomin, CrankDat, Matroda, Marshmello, Aoki)
Encore & OMNIA selling capacity; Zouk Meduza residency starting
LIV EDC Week momentum carrying through weekend
Memorial Day Sunday drive + weekender traffic expected
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize story content Fri/Sat (countdown, BTS prep); push Matroda hype Sun with exclusive angle; monitor Encore/Aoki attendance for competitive insights

content_gaps.description: Competitors running limited-time bottle service promos (Encore, OMNIA). LIV has promotional capability but no active flash sales detected this cycle.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 48h flash promo Fri morning (e.g., 'VIP Table Special this weekend'). Post to Stories with countdown timer.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using high-energy EDM drops and trap beats in Reels/TikToks. LIV content leans promotional; less emphasis on trending audio/sounds.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 short TikTok/Reel edits using top trending sounds (e.g., bass drops, siren effects) from this week's talent. Tag @matrodamusic, @crankdat.

content_gaps.description: Encore & Zouk leveraging 24/48h countdown mechanics in Stories. LIV not detected with structured countdown series.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post Story countdown series Fri evening through Sun (hourly or 6-hourly updates). Use stickers, music, text overlays. Include guest list CTA.

content_gaps.description: No behind-the-scenes talent prep content detected for LIV this week. Competitors (Hakkasan, OMNIA) showing artist arrivals and sound checks.
content_gaps.suggested_action: If Matroda/CrankDat on-site Fri/Sat, capture arrival/soundcheck video. Post to Stories or Reels with artist tag & exclusive feel.

influencer_activity.mention: Promoter leveraging XS/Encore roster; 180K followers, high engagement on event posts. Representing XS heavily this weekend.
DJ linked to LIV Beach residency; multiple user-generated posts tagged @livlasvegasvip & @john summit. Strong community engagement around his appearances.
Confirmed headlining LIV Nightclub Fri 5/29. High hype in search results; user posts with #LIVLasVegas + #MetroBootin trending.

liv_outreach_targets.name: @normanjay_lasvegas
liv_outreach_targets.reasoning: High-follower Vegas promoter currently promoting XS/Encore. Dual-venue partnership opportunity; could amplify LIV talent to his 180K audience.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_angle: Invite for Matroda SUN experience or exclusive LIV Beach bottle service promo

liv_outreach_targets.name: @johnsummit
liv_outreach_targets.reasoning: Existing LIV Beach ambassador with organic user-generated content. Strong baseline engagement. Nurture relationship.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_angle: Feature in next LIV Story takeover or request Q&A about upcoming bookings
